key.name: session-cookie
key.description: The sessionKey cookie value from claude.ai. Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies → sessionKey.

key.name: gemini-api-key
key.description: Your Gemini API key from Google AI Studio. Go to aistudio.google.com → Get API Key.

key.name: anthropic-api-key
key.description: Your Anthropic Admin API key. Go to console.anthropic.com → Settings → API keys → Create key.

key.name: openai-api-key
key.description: Your OpenAI Admin API key. The Costs API requires admin-level access. Go to platform.openai.com → Settings → Organization → API keys → Create admin key.

key.name: ollama-session-cookie
key.description: The __Secure-session cookie value from ollama.com. Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies → __Secure-session.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to fetch usage data, in minutes (5–120).
